tasks.label: suppress-codec-logs
tasks.command: adb shell "setprop log.tag.PipelineWatcher S; setprop log.tag.CCodec S; setprop log.tag.CCodecConfig S; setprop log.tag.CCodecBufferChannel S; setprop log.tag.CCodecBuffers S; setprop log.tag.C2NodeImpl S; setprop log.tag.GraphicBufferSource S; setprop log.tag.Codec2Client S; setprop log.tag.ColorUtils S; setprop log.tag.VQApply S; setprop log.tag.ReflectedParamUpdater S; setprop log.tag.BufferPoolAccessor2.0 S"
